items.title: One of the best gacha games
items.summary: Amazing gameplay, dev team, combat system, story, music and everything else. This is one of the most unique and bold gacha games i have ever seen and its amazing. Must play
items.author: Huzi_loupe

items.title: Hands down the greatest Gacha game I’ve played, never been so addicted.
items.summary: They had some problems at the start, but they are on their feet and very generous, incredible gameplay and character design is amazing. I only wish they would balance the gender ratio like they said they would. This needs more popularity.
items.author: FernSylvan

items.title: Good game
items.summary: In love with the gameplay, this game also has a very lovely artstyle and story. Can’t wait for full English translation!

items.title: Super fun + unique concept
items.summary: I originally downloaded it because I thought the concept of a cosmic horror themed gacha was interesting thinking I’d just uninstall if I got bored. The story is genuinely good AND the gameplay is super fun. There isn’t a stamina system for the main story so you can play all you want (ended up pulling an all nighter by accident.) The combat for non-chaos awakeners can be a little confusing at first but once you get the hang of it, it’s addicting. Right now I’m loving ultra realm awakeners. Wanda and Arachne are great for beating random mobs in 1 turn.
items.author: Nodin M

items.title: Criminally underrated
items.summary: The art is some of the most beautiful pieces I have ever seen, and not even limiting that to games! I’ve only played for twenty-ish days and already have thirty of the characters (not including dupes) and it is so refreshing to be able to get characters without intense grinding. I absolutely fell in love with the art and character designs and recommend this to my friends sooo much!
items.author: CybrrS1g1l1sm

items.title: Amazing game
items.summary: One of the best gacha games out there. The devs are incredibly talented and generous.
items.author: Temiiiiiiii88

items.title: Love this game
items.summary:
Can’t believe this slipped under my radar, a great game with an unexpected but loved collab.

Specifically about the that I like is the story, as its unique to me with interesting details largely unseen from other stories I’ve consumed; the art style really gets my attention as it’s got some really cool backgrounds during the story telling and gameplay, and…. Yeah that’s my main likes about this game, there are other cool things to see, but it’s best seen yourself.

Random, but the games so good it’s got me up at 12am 2 days before an exam… with near to no study 💔 hope the grind for the collab character actually pays off 🤞🥹 oh and my user is Sira
items.author: Coruzeist

items.title: 最高
items.summary: よくここまでダークなストーリーでソシャゲをやろうと思ったなというくらいにダーク（褒め言葉
items.author: ゆっくりまりちゃ

items.title: 面白いが人を選ぶのは確か
items.summary:
クトゥルフ系モチーフが好きな人にはお勧めできるが、そうでない人にはキツい描写が多いかもしれない
あと課金しなくても全然遊べるので、逆に運営が心配になる
items.author: つよいぞ僕らのGファルセイバー

items.title: おもろい
items.summary:
雰囲気が良い。
チャラくて軽い物語が嫌いな人はやってみてください。
items.author: ててててかさは

items.title: 斬新なストーリーとバトルシステム
items.summary: 重く重厚な世界観とローグライク系のゲームな好きな人には是非！！！
items.author: 面白いまじで

items.title: 好きすぎる
items.summary: クトゥルフ神話が好きな自分からするととても助かるゲーム、マイナーな所モチーフもあってキャラも個性的で可愛い！課金圧が弱すぎるけれど、長く続いてもらいたい

items.summary: 本当に嬉しかったです

items.title: 沙耶の唄コラボ
items.summary: 好きな作品のコラボで始めてみたけど、独特な世界観で面白いです。
items.author: コロネリア

items.title: 腰を据えてやるゲーム
items.summary: この令和の時代に「沙耶の唄」とコラボするゲームがあるなんて…！釣られて始めました。とにかく進めるためにストーリーはスキップしてまだ読んでいませんが、ゲームシステムだけでも十分楽しめています。ざっくり「大味になったSlay the spire」に感じます。おもしろいよ！
items.author: miakic

items.title: No sound?
items.summary: I have sound when I initially open the game but after I download resources all sound goes away. I already tried the fix button and I get the same issue.
items.author: Actic-Slash

items.title: not bad
items.summary: objectively speaking, it's pretty good, they give out a lot of freebies. However, they've been intentionally skimping on resources lately, and the demands of character progression are rising. Think carefully before diving in
items.author: navirebu

items.title: Love the game, big issue
items.summary: I cannot log into my account using Google Sign-In. Clicking my profile icon immediately triggers the error: "Third-party service login failed. Please check third-party service information." Because the login screen only permits manual typing for official Qookka Accounts, I cannot even attempt to manually enter my Google credentials to bypass the glitch. I have restarted my device, reinstalled the app, and cleared my caches, but the game's authentication handshake remains entirely broken. One star until the login system is fixed. Also, a small suggestion let people manually put in their account credentials to further avoid errors like this.
items.author: Icelessbear
